name: Performance - Policy Cache Expiry and Refresh
description: Tests that cached policy content expires after the configured TTL and is refreshed on subsequent queries.
input: POST /api/ask with the same user_input twice: once to populate cache, then after TTL expires
output: First response is from cache, second triggers retrieval and cache update
success_criteria: First query results in cache hit
After TTL, cache miss triggers retrieval
Cache is updated with new content
error_scenarios: Cache does not expire as expected
